zh: 正在计算着色器，请稍候...

en: ⚠ EXTRACTION PORTAL OPEN - HEAD TO THE EXTRACTION ROOM!
zh: ⚠ 撤离传送门已开启 - 前往撤离房间！
酿造失败！请检查你的材料。

key: Brewed quality %d drink! Served to %s who LOVED it!
en: Brewed quality %d drink! Served to %s who LOVED it!
zh: 酿造了%d级饮品！提供给%s，他们超喜欢！

key: Brewed quality %d drink! Served to %s who drank it.
en: Brewed quality %d drink! Served to %s who drank it.
zh: 酿造了%d级饮品！提供给%s并饮用。

key: Brewed quality %d drink! Served to general customers.
en: Brewed quality %d drink! Served to general customers.
zh: 酿造了%d级饮品！提供给普通顾客。

key: A brave adventurer exploring Wave Function Collapse dungeons to gather valuable brewing ingredients for the Cozy Tavern.
en: A brave adventurer exploring Wave Function Collapse dungeons to gather valuable brewing ingredients for the Cozy Tavern.
zh: 一位勇敢的冒险者探索波函数坍缩生成的地牢，为温馨酒馆收集珍贵的酿造材料。

key: A versatile close-combat weapon suited for slashing dungeon monsters.
en: A versatile close-combat weapon suited for slashing dungeon monsters.
zh: 一把多功能近战武器，适合劈砍地牢怪物。

key: A sturdy lightweight buckler used to block incoming attacks and stun opponents.
en: A sturdy lightweight buckler used to block incoming attacks and stun opponents.
zh: 一面坚固轻便的小圆盾，用于格挡来袭攻击并眩晕对手。
收集荧光浆果麦芽酒材料

key: The local travelers love the sweet-sour, glowing taste of Glowcap Ale. Gather the necessary materials in the dungeon.
en: The local travelers love the sweet-sour, glowing taste of Glowcap Ale. Gather the necessary materials in the dungeon.
zh: 当地的旅人喜爱荧光浆果麦芽酒酸甜发光的味道。在地牢中收集所需材料。

key: Tavern brewing requires highly elastic stabilizers. Defeat Slimes in the procedural dungeon to collect jelly.
en: Tavern brewing requires highly elastic stabilizers. Defeat Slimes in the procedural dungeon to collect jelly.
zh: 酒馆酿造需要高弹性稳定剂。在程序生成的地牢中击败史莱姆收集凝胶。

key: Brew a dynamic and spicy drink for the Fire Imps. Gather Fire Bloom in the dungeon vaults.
en: Brew a dynamic and spicy drink for the Fire Imps. Gather Fire Bloom in the dungeon vaults.
zh: 为火焰小鬼酿造一款充满活力的辣味饮品。在地牢密室中收集烈焰花瓣。

key: A refreshing ale with a faint glow and icy chill.
en: A refreshing ale with a faint glow and icy chill.
zh: 带有淡淡幽光与极寒霜冻风味的清爽麦芽酒。

key: An incredibly thick and sweet nectar, a slime's favorite.
en: An incredibly thick and sweet nectar, a slime's favorite.
zh: 极度黏稠甜美的花蜜，是史莱姆的最爱。

key: A strong, gamey brew with extreme bitterness and saltiness.
en: A strong, gamey brew with extreme bitterness and saltiness.
zh: 带有强烈腥膻气味与极度苦咸风味的哥布林传统烈酒。

key: Scorching hot, this demonic drink makes you breathe smoke and sulfur.
en: Scorching hot, this demonic drink makes you breathe smoke and sulfur.
zh: 辛辣灼热至极，饮下后会呼出硫磺与黑烟的恶魔之饮。

key: A high-meditation tea with floral aroma and subtle sour darkness.
en: A high-meditation tea with floral aroma and subtle sour darkness.
zh: 散发出迷离花香与微酸幽暗气质的高阶冥想圣茶。
模型查看器 / 编辑器

key: Choose whether to play the opening tutorial before entering the tavern.
en: Choose whether to play the opening tutorial before entering the tavern.
zh: 选择是否先体验开局教程，再进入酒馆。
WASD 移动  |  Shift 奔跑

key: Move away from the door. Something followed us.
en: Move away from the door. Something followed us.
zh: 离门远一点。有东西跟着我们进来了。

key: Step away from the tavern door
en: Step away from the tavern door

key: Grab the barrel with E and throw it to stun the goblin.
en: Grab the barrel with E and throw it to stun the goblin.
zh: 按 E 拿起木桶，把它砸出去眩晕哥布林。
[E] 拿起木桶  |  [左键] 投掷

key: Behind the bar. Take the weapon.
en: Behind the bar. Take the weapon.
zh: 去吧台后面，把武器拿上。

key: Fight. Left click attacks. Right click blocks. F kicks.
en: Fight. Left click attacks. Right click blocks. F kicks.
zh: 开始战斗。左键攻击，右键格挡，F 踢击。
[左键] 攻击  |  [右键] 格挡  |  [F] 踢击

key: The tavern is yours. Sign the inheritance letter.
en: The tavern is yours. Sign the inheritance letter.
zh: 这间酒馆归你了。签下这封继承书吧。

key: Write your permanent name into the letter
en: Write your permanent name into the letter
zh: 把你的永久名字写进这封信里

key:
To the new keeper of this tavern,

The former heir has been struck from this record.
All rights, debts, barrels, and broken chairs now pass to you.

Dear
en:
To the new keeper of this tavern,

The former heir has been struck from this record.
All rights, debts, barrels, and broken chairs now pass to you.

Dear
zh:
致这间酒馆的新主人：

前任继承人的名字已从记录中划去。
从现在起，酒馆的一切权益、债务、木桶与破椅子，皆归你所有。

亲爱的

key: ,\nplease confirm by mark and claim the tavern.
en: ,\nplease confirm by mark and claim the tavern.
zh: ，\n请按下手印，正式接收这间酒馆。

key: Channels physical power into a single devastating blow, dealing 150% physical damage. Can stun low-tier enemies on impact.
en: Channels physical power into a single devastating blow, dealing 150% physical damage. Can stun low-tier enemies on impact.
zh: 凝聚物理力量进行一次毁灭性打击，造成 150% 物理伤害。击中时可眩晕低阶敌人。

key: Performs a rapid 360-degree sweep with the main-hand weapon, hitting all nearby monsters and dealing 80% slash damage.
en: Performs a rapid 360-degree sweep with the main-hand weapon, hitting all nearby monsters and dealing 80% slash damage.
zh: 使用主手武器进行一次快速的 360 度横扫，击中周围所有怪物并造成 80% 斩击伤害。

key: Raises the shield in defense, raising Guard Rating and damage reduction by 100% for 3 seconds. Blocked attacks recovery speed increases.
en: Raises the shield in defense, raising Guard Rating and damage reduction by 100% for 3 seconds. Blocked attacks recovery speed increases.
zh: 举盾防御，使格挡等级和伤害减免提高 100%，持续 3 秒。格挡后的攻击恢复速度加快。

key: Passive: When HP drops below 30%, increases attack speed, recovery speed and movement speed by 40% until health is restored.
en: Passive: When HP drops below 30%, increases attack speed, recovery speed and movement speed by 40% until health is restored.
zh: 被动：当生命值低于 30% 时，提高攻击速度、恢复速度和移动速度 40%，直到生命值恢复。

key: Select a skill to inspect its parameters...
en: Select a skill to inspect its parameters...
zh: 选择一个技能查看参数...

key: Basic adventuring hood providing minimal defense but high comfort.
en: Basic adventuring hood providing minimal defense but high comfort.
zh: 基础冒险兜帽，提供最低限度防护但佩戴舒适。

key: Reinforced leather tunic, offering decent protection against bites and scratches.
en: Reinforced leather tunic, offering decent protection against bites and scratches.
zh: 强化皮甲外套，可有效抵御撕咬和抓挠。

key: Thick leather wrap to protect knuckles during close combat and shield grips.
en: Thick leather wrap to protect knuckles during close combat and shield grips.
zh: 厚皮革护手，在近战和持盾时保护指关节。

key: Heavy dungeon travel boots protecting feet from acid traps and mud.
en: Heavy dungeon travel boots protecting feet from acid traps and mud.
zh: 重型地牢旅行靴，保护双脚免受酸液陷阱和泥泞伤害。

key: Can hold spare ranged weapons like Short Bows or Crossbows.
en: Can hold spare ranged weapons like Short Bows or Crossbows.
zh: 可存放短弓或弩等备用远程武器。

key: Copper signet ring carved with tiny tavern engravings. Increases max health slightly.
en: Copper signet ring carved with tiny tavern engravings. Increases max health slightly.
zh: 刻有微小酒馆图案的铜质印章戒指。略微提高生命上限。

key: Bare knuckles. Useful when weapon breaks, but damage reach is extremely limited.
en: Bare knuckles. Useful when weapon breaks, but damage reach is extremely limited.
zh: 赤手空拳。武器损坏时有用，但伤害和范围极为有限。

key: Can equip Bucklers or Heater Shields to block incoming strikes.
en: Can equip Bucklers or Heater Shields to block incoming strikes.
zh: 可装备小圆盾或鸢盾来格挡来袭攻击。

key: A close-combat weapon suited for slashing dungeon monsters.
en: A close-combat weapon suited for slashing dungeon monsters.
zh: 适合劈砍地牢怪物的近战武器。

key: A sturdy buckler used to block attacks and stun opponents.
en: A sturdy buckler used to block attacks and stun opponents.
zh: 用于格挡攻击和眩晕对手的坚固小圆盾。

key: An ingredient collected from the deep dungeon vaults.
en: An ingredient collected from the deep dungeon vaults.
zh: 从地牢深处收集的酿造材料。

en: You venture deeper into the dungeon…

key: A handheld weapon, configurable to any hand slot.
en: A handheld weapon, configurable to any hand slot.
zh: 手持装备，可配置到任意手持槽。

key: A shield shares the off-hand slot with weapons; switch via scroll wheel.
en: A shield shares the off-hand slot with weapons; switch via scroll wheel.
zh: 盾牌与武器共用手持槽，可通过滚轮切换。

key: Armor participates in hit defense and may be damaged on extraction failure.
en: Armor participates in hit defense and may be damaged on extraction failure.
zh: 防具会参与受击防御，并可能在撤离失败时损坏。

key: Brewing material recovered from the dungeon.
en: Brewing material recovered from the dungeon.
zh: 地牢中带回的酿造材料。

key: Defensive gear equippable in the off-hand slot.
en: Defensive gear equippable in the off-hand slot.
zh: 可装备到手持槽的防御装备。

key: A scene object you can lift, throw, or use in impromptu combat.
en: A scene object you can lift, throw, or use in impromptu combat.
zh: 可举起、投掷或用于临时战斗的场景物件。
暗蚀 %d - 差不多该撤了
暗蚀 %d - 周围开始躁动

key: 18:00 reached - tonight's tavern earnings are lost
en: 18:00 reached - tonight's tavern earnings are lost
zh: 18:00 已到，今晚经营收入归零
穿甲 %.0f%%  击退 %.1fm/s  眩晕 %.1fs

key: Shield  Active Block (0.3s perfect window, no durability loss)
en: Shield  Active Block (0.3s perfect window, no durability loss)
zh: 持盾  动作格挡（0.3s完美窗口免耐久）
双手武器  精确格挡（0.3s窗口）
攻击间隔 %.2fs  移动速度 %.2fm/s

key: 下料篮为空，请先选择材料
en: Mixing basket is empty; select materials first
zh: 下料篮为空，请先选择材料

key: 无空桶可用，请先开缸或扩建
en: No empty barrel; open one or expand first
zh: 无空桶可用，请先开缸或扩建

en: Barrel %d is not empty; select an empty barrel

key: 已下料至桶%d，发酵中（明日完成）
zh: 已下料至桶%d，发酵中（明日完成）

key: 桶%d不可陈酿（仅 READY 状态可封存）
en: Barrel %d cannot be aged (only READY state can be sealed)
zh: 桶%d不可陈酿（仅 READY 状态可封存）

key: 桶%d已封存陈酿，每日口味 +1，最多 3 天
en: Barrel %d sealed for aging; +1 flavor/day, up to 3 days
zh: 桶%d已封存陈酿，每日口味 +1，最多 3 天

key: 神迹！这股香醇彻底征服了我！不虚此生！
en: A miracle! This exquisite brew has conquered me - a life fulfilled!
zh: 神迹！这股香醇彻底征服了我！不虚此生！

key: 噢噢噢！太正宗了！这就是我想要的味道！
en: Whoa! So authentic! Exactly the taste I craved!
zh: 噢噢噢！太正宗了！这就是我想要的味道！

key: 啧，味道勉强凑合。润润喉咙还行。
en: Tsk, the flavor's merely passable. Fine for wetting the throat.
zh: 啧，味道勉强凑合。润润喉咙还行。

key: 呸！这什么恶心的马尿！别指望我留下铁片！
en: Bah! What revolting swill! Don't expect me to leave a single coin!
zh: 呸！这什么恶心的马尿！别指望我留下铁片！

key: 这价格……算了，下次不来了。
en: At this price... forget it. I won't be back.
zh: 这价格……算了，下次不来了。

key: 提高伤害，并附加燃烧概率。
en: Increases damage and adds a burn chance.
zh: 提高伤害，并附加燃烧概率。

key: 提高冲撞位移冲量，并强化后续地形撞击伤害。
en: Increases charge momentum and follow-up terrain-impact damage.
zh: 提高冲撞位移冲量，并强化后续地形撞击伤害。

key: 提高踢击给予的位移距离，并强化落点撞击伤害。
en: Increases kick displacement and landing-impact damage.
zh: 提高踢击给予的位移距离，并强化落点撞击伤害。

key: 额外触发一次机制，但略微增加冷却。
en: Triggers the mechanism an extra time, but slightly raises cooldown.
zh: 额外触发一次机制，但略微增加冷却。

key: 强化被动或增益类技能的数值与持续时间。
en: Boosts the values and duration of passive or buff skills.
zh: 强化被动或增益类技能的数值与持续时间。

key: 初始区域。潮湿的石砌地牢，老鼠横行，适合新手熟悉战斗与采集。
en: Starting zone. A damp stone dungeon teeming with rats; ideal for learning combat and gathering.
zh: 初始区域。潮湿的石砌地牢，老鼠横行，适合新手熟悉战斗与采集。

key: 新手友好区。盛产黑莓、蓝光菇、月光草等温和材料。
en: Beginner-friendly. Abundant in mild materials like blackberries, glowshrooms, and moongrass.
zh: 新手友好区。盛产黑莓、蓝光菇、月光草等温和材料。

key: 盛产黑麦根、深岩苔藓、独眼巨人胡须。盲鱼与碎岩虫出没。
en: Rich in black rye root, deeprock moss, and cyclops beard. Blind fish and rock-borers lurk.
zh: 盛产黑麦根、深岩苔藓、独眼巨人胡须。盲鱼与碎岩虫出没。

key: 灵魂薄荷、月露花、曼德拉根生长之地。亡灵徘徊。
en: Where soulmint, moon lilies, and mandrakes grow. Undead wander.
zh: 灵魂薄荷、月露花、曼德拉根生长之地。亡灵徘徊。

key: 高危区。火焰葡萄、熔岩麦芽、爆裂椒等炽热材料，火蜥蜴横行。
en: High-risk zone. Fiery materials like firegrapes, lava malt, and burst peppers; salamanders roam.
zh: 高危区。火焰葡萄、熔岩麦芽、爆裂椒等炽热材料，火蜥蜴横行。

key: 极危区。水晶泪滴、远古符文碎、星光苔等灵界材料。幽灵守卫徘徊。
en: Extreme-danger zone. Ethereal materials like crystal tears and ancient rune shards; ghost guardians patrol.
zh: 极危区。水晶泪滴、远古符文碎、星光苔等灵界材料。幽灵守卫徘徊。

en: +25% hit rate; on hit, guaranteed crit

key: 闪避/格挡后 40% 概率免费反击 80% 基础攻击力
en: After dodge/block, 40% chance to free counter for 80% base ATK
zh: 闪避/格挡后 40% 概率免费反击 80% 基础攻击力

key: 前方扇形 3 米内敌人 85% 伤害 + 击退 1 米
en: 85% damage to enemies in a 3m frontal cone + knockback 1m
zh: 前方扇形 3 米内敌人 85% 伤害 + 击退 1 米

en: 1s charge: 220% damage, ignore 20% physical DEF, +2m knockback
zh: 蓄力 1 秒，220% 伤害，无视 20% 物防，击退 +2 米

key: 目标 HP < 35% 时基础伤害 ×1.6
en: Base damage x1.6 when target HP < 35%
zh: 目标 HP < 35% 时基础伤害 ×1.6

key: 周围 1.5 米内 120% 伤害，无视 15% 物防
en: 120% damage to all within 1.5m, ignore 15% physical DEF
zh: 周围 1.5 米内 120% 伤害，无视 15% 物防

key: 90% 伤害 + 击退 1 米，撞墙追加 30% 碰撞伤害 + 2 秒眩晕
en: 90% damage + knockback 1m; on wall hit +30% collision damage and 2s stun
zh: 90% 伤害 + 击退 1 米，撞墙追加 30% 碰撞伤害 + 2 秒眩晕

key: 对眩晕/立足不稳目标暴击率 +30%、暴击伤害 +25%
en: +30% crit rate and +25% crit damage vs stunned/off-balance targets
zh: 对眩晕/立足不稳目标暴击率 +30%、暴击伤害 +25%

en: 110% damage in a 3m frontal line + knockback 2m + guaranteed 1s stun
zh: 前方直线 3 米 110% 伤害 + 击退 2 米 + 必眩晕 1 秒

key: 直线 2 米单体 105% 伤害 + 命中 +10%
en: 105% single-target damage in a 2m line +10% hit
zh: 直线 2 米单体 105% 伤害 + 命中 +10%

key: 前方扇形 3 米 80% 伤害 + 减速 3 秒
en: 80% damage in a 3m frontal cone + slow 3s
zh: 前方扇形 3 米 80% 伤害 + 减速 3 秒

key: 2 米单体 180% 伤害 + 命中 +15% + 无视盾牌格挡
en: 180% single-target damage at 2m +15% hit, ignore shield block
zh: 2 米单体 180% 伤害 + 命中 +15% + 无视盾牌格挡

key: 射程 4 米，95% 远程伤害 + 命中 +30%
zh: 射程 4 米，95% 远程伤害 + 命中 +30%

key: 2x2 米区域 70% 伤害 + 闪避 -10% 持续 3 秒
en: 70% damage in a 2x2m area, target Evasion -10% for 3s
zh: 2x2 米区域 70% 伤害 + 闪避 -10% 持续 3 秒

en: Pierces in a 5m line, -15% damage per enemy pierced
zh: 直线 5 米穿透，每穿一敌伤害 -15%

zh: 同目标两发，各 60% 伤害独立判定命中暴击

key: 110% 伤害 + 击退 1 米 + 2 秒减速 30%
zh: 110% 伤害 + 击退 1 米 + 2 秒减速 30%

key: 弩箭齐射 / Volley of Bolts
zh: 弩箭齐射 / Volley of Bolts

zh: 周围 1.5 米 80% 法术伤害 + 地面冰冻 2 秒（减速 30%）
